info.title: Attentive Provisioning API
info.description:
The Attentive Provisioning API is used for creating and managing Attentive Accounts, Users and Subscribers.

This Open API Spec is configured to use Bearer Token authentication. Click the Authorize button and enter your Attentive API Key to authenticate.

tags.name: Preflight
tags.description: Check for existence of company name or domain

tags.name: Status
tags.description: Check company status and fetch credentials

tags.name: Subscribers
tags.description: Fetch and update subscriber identifiers (requires **Child API Key**)

get.summary: Check if domain prefix is available

parameters.name: attentiveDomainPrefix
parameters.description: The prefix to validate

200.description: The attentive domain prefix is valid and available

400.description: The attentive domain prefix is invalid

409.description: The attentive domain prefix is not available

get.summary: Check if internal name is available

parameters.name: internalName
parameters.description: The company internal name to validate

200.description: The company internal name is available

409.description: The company internal name is not available

400.description: Company could not be created. Check required fields

409.description: Company could not be created. Company already exists

parameters.description: Encoded ID of company in Attentive system

parameters.description: Encoded ID of company in Attentive system

400.description: Company could not be updated. Check required fields

get.summary: Fetch subscriptions by email, phone or clientUserId

parameters.description: Client User Id for subscriber lookup

parameters.description: Subscriber's phone, in E.164 format

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Subscriber's email address

put.description: Delete existing subscriber with matching phone and email and create a new one.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your API key as the Bearer Token when making calls to this API.

contactEmail.description: Email to contact is anything goes wrong with the token
Email contact associated with the marketplace app

id.description: Encoded ID of company in Attentive system

externalId.description: External company id (i.e. the studio id)

internalName.description: Name of company to display in Attentive UI

tradeName.description: Operating business name (if different from displayName)

legalName.description: The name that appears on the business's official government documents (required for U.S. and CA-based companies)

businessContactEmail.description: Email to register tollfree phone number

businessContactFirstName.description: Contact first name (required for phone provisioning)

businessContactLastName.description: Contact last name (required for phone provisioning)

termsUrl.description: URL of legal terms. Will default to parent company's terms URL if not provided.

privacyPolicyUrl.description: URL of privacy policy. Will default to parent company's terms URL if not provided.

fromEmail.description: Email to send marketing emails from

attentiveDomainPrefix.description: Prefix of URL for shortened links in messages (ex: ot1 becomes ot1.attn.tv). Must be at least 3 characters

accountType.description: Type of account (MINDBODY, GLOBAL_CORP, REGIONAL_CORP, LOCATION) and test types (TEST_MINDBODY, TEST_REGIONAL_CORP, TEST_GLOBAL_CORP, TEST_LOCATION)

addressLine2.description: Secondary address information of business location

businessEntityType.description: The company's type - choose from PUBLIC,PRIVATE,and SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP. Required for all U.S. and Canada-based companies.

businessRegistrationNumber.description: A U.S.-based, non-sole proprietorship company's EIN, or a Canada-based company's CBN. Required for U.S.-based, non-sole-proprietorships, and all Canadian companies.

dryRun.description: If set to true, payload will be validated but will not create a real company in Attentive's system
